full_text:
Guo Gong йғӯиІў
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Guo Gong (йғӯиІў). Led an army of tens of thousands, persuaded not to attack Juancheng by Xun Yu. Guo Gong was affiliated with Zhang Miao.
